requirement_topic.en: Mauritania Grid Connection — ARE Oversight, SOMELEC Acceptance, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 毛里塔尼亚并网——ARE监管、SOMELEC接受、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 茅利塔尼亞併網——ARE監管、SOMELEC接受、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: Mauritania does not publish, in the sources reviewed, a single solar-inverter grid code equivalent to Qatar's Kahramaa PV specification. The practical gate for grid-tied PV inverters is project-specific acceptance by SOMELEC and, where generation, delegated public-service electricity supply, mini-grid, or IPP licensing is involved, ARE oversight and applicable electricity-sector texts. Mauritania is commonly reported as a 50 Hz, 220/380 V market; inverter protection settings, anti-islanding behaviour, voltage/frequency windows, reconnection delays, and power-quality controls should therefore be validated for the actual SOMELEC connection point. IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 are the appropriate international evidence anchors unless a project owner, lender, or local authority requires a different edition or a Mauritania-specific setting sheet.
summary.zh: 在已审查来源中，未发现毛里塔尼亚公布了类似卡塔尔Kahramaa光伏规格的单一太阳能逆变器并网规范。并网光伏逆变器的实际门槛是SOMELEC按项目进行技术接受；若涉及发电、委托公共电力服务、微网或独立发电项目许可，还须满足ARE监管及适用电力行业文本。毛里塔尼亚通常被报告为50 Hz、220/380 V市场；因此逆变器保护整定、防孤岛行为、电压/频率窗口、重连延迟和电能质量控制应针对实际SOMELEC接入点验证。除非项目业主、贷款方或当地主管部门要求其他版本或毛里塔尼亚专用整定表，IEC 62116和IEC 61727是合适的国际证据锚点。
summary.zht: 在已審查來源中，未發現茅利塔尼亞公布了類似卡達Kahramaa光伏規格的單一太陽能逆變器併網規範。併網光伏逆變器的實際門檻是SOMELEC按項目進行技術接受；若涉及發電、委託公共電力服務、微網或獨立發電項目許可，還須滿足ARE監管及適用電力行業文本。茅利塔尼亞通常被報告為50 Hz、220/380 V市場；因此逆變器保護整定、防孤島行為、電壓/頻率視窗、重連延遲和電能品質控制應針對實際SOMELEC接入點驗證。除非項目業主、貸款方或當地主管部門要求其他版本或茅利塔尼亞專用整定表，IEC 62116和IEC 61727是合適的國際證據錨點。

standards_or_laws: ARE electricity-sector texts and delegated public-service procedures — confirm current scope directly with ARE
SOMELEC project-specific grid-connection and commissioning requirements — confirm at the connection point
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Mauritania grid parameters commonly reported as 50 Hz, 220/380 V — verify with SOMELEC for the project site

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, domestic anti-islanding results, and firmware settings for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V system. Although the nominal voltage and frequency may appear similar to Mauritania's commonly reported system, Chinese documents are written for Chinese grid operators and do not establish ARE licence compliance, SOMELEC connection acceptance, or donor/lender project acceptance in Mauritania.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、国内防孤岛结果以及针对中国50 Hz、220/380 V系统的固件整定。尽管标称电压和频率可能与毛里塔尼亚通常报告的系统相似，中国文件仍是面向中国电网运营商编制，不能证明满足毛里塔尼亚ARE许可、SOMELEC接入接受或捐助方/贷款方项目接受。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、國內防孤島結果以及針對中國50 Hz、220/380 V系統的韌體整定。儘管標稱電壓和頻率可能與茅利塔尼亞通常報告的系統相似，中國文件仍是面向中國電網營運商編製，不能證明滿足茅利塔尼亞ARE許可、SOMELEC接入接受或捐助方/貸款方項目接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid documents should be treated as engineering background, not as Mauritania grid-connection approval. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a project-specific protection-setting sheet, a commissioning test plan, and a derating/thermal design note for the specific SOMELEC connection point or off-grid public-service concession. Confirm whether ARE licensing, delegated-service approval, or public procurement requirements apply before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件应视为工程背景资料，而非毛里塔尼亚并网批准。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、项目专用保护整定表、调试测试计划，以及针对具体SOMELEC接入点或离网公共服务特许项目的降额/热设计说明。出货前应确认是否适用ARE许可、委托公共服务批准或公共采购要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件應視為工程背景資料，而非茅利塔尼亞併網批准。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、項目專用保護整定表、調試測試計畫，以及針對具體SOMELEC接入點或離網公共服務特許項目的降額/熱設計說明。出貨前應確認是否適用ARE許可、委託公共服務批准或公共採購要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied or public-service electricity projects: SOMELEC technical acceptance and, where applicable, ARE licensing or delegated-service approval are project gates; exact published inverter standard scope is unconfirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side grid operator expectations but does not transfer automatically to Mauritania ARE/SOMELEC acceptance

source.publisher: Autorité de Régulation (ARE), République Islamique de Mauritanie

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T grid certificates alone for Mauritania. Use IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, document 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V protection settings for the actual connection point, and obtain project-specific SOMELEC and ARE confirmation before commissioning. Where the DNPQ or another national conformity route is invoked by the importer or customs broker, verify the current procedure locally because the public source trail is incomplete.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要仅依赖中国GB/T并网证书进入毛里塔尼亚。应使用IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，记录实际接入点的50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V保护整定，并在调试前取得SOMELEC和ARE的项目专用确认。如进口商或报关代理提出DNPQ或其他国家合格评定路径，请在当地核实现行程序，因为公开来源链条并不完整。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要僅依賴中國GB/T併網證書進入茅利塔尼亞。應使用IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，記錄實際接入點的50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V保護整定，並在調試前取得SOMELEC和ARE的項目專用確認。如進口商或報關代理提出DNPQ或其他國家合格評定路徑，請在當地核實現行程序，因為公開來源鏈條並不完整。

requirement_topic.en: Mauritania Utility, Mini-Grid, and Donor-Financed Solar Projects — Project Approval and Harsh-Environment Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 毛里塔尼亚公用事业、微网及捐助方融资太阳能项目——项目审批和严酷环境降额
requirement_topic.zht: 茅利塔尼亞公用事業、微網及捐助方融資太陽能項目——項目審批和嚴酷環境降額

summary.en: Mauritania has strong Sahara/Sahel solar and wind resources and active utility, off-grid, mini-grid, storage, and green-hydrogen project pipelines. The applicable inverter gate is often not a general consumer-product rule but a project contract: SOMELEC technical requirements for utility projects, ARE procedures for delegated public-service electricity supply, and donor/lender specifications for World Bank, AfDB, or other financed projects. Inverters should be specified for high ambient temperature, dust and sand ingress, thermal derating, ventilation/filter maintenance, and coastal salt exposure near Nouakchott or Nouadhibou. Lender specifications may require IEC test reports, bankable warranty terms, spare-parts commitments, and factory QA evidence beyond China domestic certificates.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚拥有很强的撒哈拉/萨赫勒太阳能和风能资源，并存在公用事业、离网、微网、储能和绿色氢能项目管线。逆变器适用门槛往往不是一般消费品规则，而是项目合同：公用事业项目的SOMELEC技术要求、委托公共电力服务的ARE程序，以及世界银行、非洲开发银行或其他融资项目的捐助方/贷款方规格。逆变器应针对高环境温度、沙尘侵入、热降额、通风/滤网维护以及努瓦克肖特或努瓦迪布附近沿海盐雾暴露进行规格化。贷款方规格可能要求IEC测试报告、可融资的质保条款、备件承诺和工厂质量保证证据，范围超出中国国内证书。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞擁有很強的撒哈拉/薩赫勒太陽能和風能資源，並存在公用事業、離網、微網、儲能和綠色氫能項目管線。逆變器適用門檻往往不是一般消費品規則，而是項目合同：公用事業項目的SOMELEC技術要求、委託公共電力服務的ARE程序，以及世界銀行、非洲開發銀行或其他融資項目的捐助方/貸款方規格。逆變器應針對高環境溫度、沙塵侵入、熱降額、通風/濾網維護以及努瓦克肖特或努瓦迪布附近沿海鹽霧暴露進行規格化。貸款方規格可能要求IEC測試報告、可融資的質保條款、備件承諾和工廠品質保證證據，範圍超出中國國內證書。

standards_or_laws: SOMELEC project tender and connection requirements — project-specific
ARE delegated public-service electricity procedures — project-specific
World Bank, AfDB, or other lender procurement and environmental/social specifications where applicable
IEC 60068 environmental testing series — useful for heat, dust, humidity, and salt-mist evidence where specified by the project
IEC 60529 ingress protection ratings — commonly used for enclosure IP claims

summary.en: China-side inverter documentation may include GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, factory QA records, CQC/CGC voluntary certificates, environmental test summaries, and standard product warranties. These documents do not automatically address Mauritania-specific site stresses, spare-parts logistics, French/Arabic documentation needs, lender procurement clauses, or project-owner availability guarantees.
summary.zh: 中国侧逆变器文件可能包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、工厂质量记录、CQC/CGC自愿性证书、环境测试摘要和标准产品质保。上述文件不会自动覆盖毛里塔尼亚特定场址应力、备件物流、法语/阿拉伯语文件需求、贷款方采购条款或项目业主可用率保证。
summary.zht: 中國側逆變器文件可能包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、工廠品質記錄、CQC/CGC自願性證書、環境測試摘要和標準產品質保。上述文件不會自動覆蓋茅利塔尼亞特定場址應力、備件物流、法語/阿拉伯語文件需求、貸款方採購條款或項目業主可用率保證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
Factory ISO 9001 quality-management evidence and product warranty documents — supplier-specific

gap.en: Gap: A Chinese certificate package may pass domestic procurement review but still fail Mauritania project review if it lacks site-specific derating curves, IP rating evidence, salt/dust/heat qualification, French/Arabic manuals, spare-parts and service commitments, or lender-formatted IEC reports. For utility and mini-grid projects, align the inverter data package with the tender, PPA, concession, lender, and SOMELEC commissioning requirements before shipping hardware.
gap.zh: 差距：中国证书包可能通过国内采购审查，但若缺少场址专用降额曲线、IP等级证据、盐雾/沙尘/高温适应性证明、法语/阿拉伯语手册、备件和服务承诺或贷款方格式的IEC报告，仍可能无法通过毛里塔尼亚项目审查。对于公用事业和微网项目，应在发货前使逆变器资料包与招标文件、购电协议、特许协议、贷款方要求及SOMELEC调试要求一致。
gap.zht: 差距：中國證書包可能通過國內採購審查，但若缺少場址專用降額曲線、IP等級證據、鹽霧/沙塵/高溫適應性證明、法語/阿拉伯語手冊、備件和服務承諾或貸款方格式的IEC報告，仍可能無法通過茅利塔尼亞項目審查。對於公用事業和微網項目，應在發貨前使逆變器資料包與招標文件、購電協議、特許協議、貸款方要求及SOMELEC調試要求一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where incorporated into tender, concession, PPA, lender, SOMELEC, or ARE approval documents; harsh-environment derating is a practical reliability gate even where not named in a statute
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic product qualification is not a substitute for Mauritania site-specific and lender-specific project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Mauritania PV inverter acceptance as a project file, not only a product certificate file. Add heat, dust, ingress-protection, salt-exposure, warranty, spare-parts, and French/Arabic documentation evidence to the IEC grid package. Confirm the current SOMELEC tender or connection terms, ARE licence or delegated-service status, and any lender requirements before shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将毛里塔尼亚光伏逆变器接受视为项目文件，而不仅是产品证书文件。请在IEC并网资料包中加入高温、沙尘、防护等级、盐雾暴露、质保、备件及法语/阿拉伯语文件证据。发货前请确认现行SOMELEC招标或接入条款、ARE许可或委托公共服务状态以及任何贷款方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將茅利塔尼亞光伏逆變器接受視為項目文件，而不僅是產品證書文件。請在IEC併網資料包中加入高溫、沙塵、防護等級、鹽霧暴露、質保、備件及法語/阿拉伯語文件證據。發貨前請確認現行SOMELEC招標或接入條款、ARE許可或委託公共服務狀態以及任何貸款方要求。
